mapper.sql: id, goods_id, status, category_id, brand, name, brief, material, season, style, ai_recognized, ai_confidence, source_image, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, g.name as goods_name, g.pic_url as goods_image_url, c.name as category_name FROM clothing_goods_sku s LEFT JOIN litemall_goods g ON s.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN litemall_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND color = #{color} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM clothing_goods_sku WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND color = #{color} AND size = #{size} AND deleted = 0

SELECT s.*, g.name as goods_name, g.pic_url as goods_image_url, c.name as category_name FROM clothing_goods_sku s LEFT JOIN litemall_goods g ON s.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN litemall_category c ON s.category_id = c.id
s.deleted = 0 AND s.status = #{status} AND s.category_id = #{categoryId} AND s.color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{color}, '%') AND s.size = #{size} AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.sku_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND s.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND s.goods_id IS NOT NULL AND s.goods_id IS NULL
ORDER BY s.update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_goods_sku ( goods_id, status, category_id, brand, name, brief, material, season, style, ai_recognized, ai_confidence, source_image, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{goodsId}, #{status}, #{categoryId}, #{brand}, #{name}, #{brief}, #{material}, #{season}, #{style}, #{aiRecognized}, #{aiConfidence}, #{sourceImage}, #{skuCode}, #{color}, #{colorImage}, #{size}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{barCode}, #{isDefault}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO clothing_goods_sku
goods_id, status, category_id, brand, name, brief, material, season, style, ai_recognized, ai_confidence, source_image, sku_code, color, color_image, size, price, stock, image_url, bar_code, is_default, deleted, add_time, update_time,
#{goodsId},
#{status}, 'draft',
#{categoryId}, #{brand}, #{name}, #{brief}, #{material}, #{season}, #{style}, #{aiRecognized}, #{aiConfidence}, #{sourceImage}, #{skuCode}, #{color}, #{colorImage}, #{size}, #{price}, #{stock}, ELSE 0, #{imageUrl}, #{barCode}, #{isDefault}, 0, NOW(), NOW(),
mapper.update: UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET deleted = 1 WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}

UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE clothing_goods_sku SET goods_id = #{goodsId}, status = 'published', update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{skuId}
